description.value: Price 11,000 gp; Slot none; CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura strong (no school) DESCRIPTION This rod is crafted from a gnarled branch covered in sharp thorns. Three times per day when a wielder of this rod uses a hex (but not an advanced hex or grand hex), she can use this rod’s power to double the range of the hex, so long as the hex has a range measured in feet. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,500 gp; Feats Craft Rod, Reach Spell; Special creator must possess the hex class feature
